mapper.select: SELECT L.MEMBER_NO, DATE_FORMAT(L.ORDER_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ORDER_DATE, L.ORDER_NO, L.ORDER_STATE, G.GOODS_NAME, L.ORDER_TOTAL_PAY_PRICE, L.ORDER_PAY_OPTION, L.ORDER_EXPRESS, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ORDER_DETAIL SD WHERE SD.ORDER_NO = L.ORDER_NO) HAP_CNT FROM ORDER_LIST L JOIN ORDER_DETAIL D ON D.ORDER_NO = L.ORDER_NO JOIN GOODS G ON G.GOODS_NO = D.GOODS_NO WHERE L.MEMBER_NO = #{member_no} AND D.ORDER_DETAIL_NO = ( SELECT MIN(OD.ORDER_DETAIL_NO) FROM ORDER_DETAIL OD WHERE OD.ORDER_NO = L.ORDER_NO ) ORDER BY L.ORDER_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ORDER_DETAIL SET order_detail_state = '20' where order_no = #{order_no}
mapper.select: select l.member_no, l.order_use_point, l.order_save_point, p.point_total, l.order_no from ORDER_LIST l, POINT p where l.member_no = p.member_no and l.order_no = #{order_no} order by p.point_no desc limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POINT (MEMBER_NO, POINT_VAL, POINT_SAVE_DATE, POINT_TOTAL) VALUES ( #{member_no}, #{order_use_point}, NOW(), #{use_hap})
INSERT INTO POINT (MEMBER_NO, POINT_VAL, POINT_USE_DATE, POINT_TOTAL) VALUES ( #{member_no}, #{order_save_point}, NOW(), #{save_hap})
mapper.select: select g.goods_name, d.order_detail_no, d.order_no, d.goods_no, d.goods_att_no, d.order_detail_color, d.order_detail_size, d.order_detail_amount, d.order_discount_apply, d.order_detail_save_point from ORDER_DETAIL d, GOODS g where d.goods_no = g.goods_no and order_no = #{order_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AS_LIST (AS_GUBUN, MEMBER_NO, AS_TITLE, AS_CONTENT, ORDER_NO, ORDER_DETAIL_NO, AS_STATE, ORDER_STATE, AS_SDATE, AS_EDATE) VALUES ( #{gubun}, #{chfMember_no}, #{chfSubject}, #{chfContent}, #{chfOrder_no}, #{select_detail_no}, '1', #{order_state}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: select as_no, as_gubun, member_no, as_title, as_content, order_no, order_detail_no, as_state, DATE_FORMAT(as_sdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as_sdate from AS_LIST where member_no = #{member_no} order by as_sdate desc

select member_grade, member_total, point_total, (select count(coupon_status_no) from COUPON_STATUS where member_no = m.member_no and coupon_use_state = 1 ) cp_cnt, (select count(like_no) from GOODS_LIKE where member_no = m.member_no and like_delete = 1) lno_cnt from MEMBER m, POINT p where m.member_no = p.member_no and m.member_no = 2
SELECT ORDER_DATE, ORDER_TOTAL_ORDER_PRICE, ORDER_STATE FROM ORDER_LIST WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{MEMBER_NO}
SELECT g.GOODS_NAME, o.GOODS_ATT_NO, m.MEMBER_NO FROM GOODS g, ORDER_DETAIL o, MEMBER m WHERE g.GOODS_NO = o.GOODS_NO AND m.MEMBER_NO = #{MEMBER_NO}

SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PASSWD, DATE_FORMAT(MEMBER_BIRTH, '%Y/%m/%d') MEMBER_BIRTH, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_ZIPCODE, MEMBER_ADDR1, MEMBER_ADDR2, EMAIL_AGREE, SMS_AGREE FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{MEMBER_ID}
SELECT MEMBER_ID FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_PASSWD = #{MEMBER_PASSWD} AND MEMBER_ID = #{MEMBER_ID}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MEMBER_DELETE = '1' WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{MEMBER_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT POINT_NO, POINT_VAL, DATE_FORMAT(POINT_SAVE_DATE, '%Y/%m/%d') POINT_SAVE_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(POINT_USE_DATE, '%Y/%m/%d') POINT_USE_DATE, POINT_TOTAL FROM POINT WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{MEMBER_NO} ORDER BY POINT_NO DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT S.COUPON_STATUS_NO,S.COUPON_USE_STATE,DATE_FORMAT(S.COUPON_ISSUE_DATE, '%Y/%m/%d') COUPON_ISSUE_DATE, DATE_FORMAT(S.COUPON_USE_DATE, '%Y/%m/%d') COUPON_USE_DATE, C.COUPON_NO,C.COUPON_ID,C.COUPON_VALUE,DATE_FORMAT(C.COUPON_S_VALIDITY, '%Y/%m/%d') COUPON_S_VALIDITY, DATE_FORMAT(C.COUPON_E_VALIDITY, '%Y/%m/%d') COUPON_E_VALIDITY FROM COUPON C, COUPON_STATUS S WHERE S.MEMBER_NO = #{MEMBER_NO} AND C.COUPON_NO = S.COUPON_NO
SELECT L.LIKE_NO,L.GOODS_NO, G.GOODS_NAME,G.GOODS_SELL_PRICE,G.GOODS_THUMBNAIL FROM GOODS_LIKE L, GOODS G WHERE L.MEMBER_NO = #{MEMBER_NO} AND L.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO

SELECT Q.GOODS_QNA_NO, Q.GOODS_NO, Q.GOODS_QNA_CONTENT, Q.GOODS_QNA_TITLE, Q.GOODS_QNA_LEVEL, Q.GOODS_QNA_DATE, Q.GOODS_QNA_SECRET, Q.GOODS_QNA_AN, G.GOODS_NAME, G.GOODS_THUMBNAIL FROM GOODS_QNA Q, GOODS G WHERE Q.MEMBER_NO = #{MEMBER_NO} AND Q.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO

SELECT R.REVIEW_NO, R.MEMBER_NO, R.ORDER_NO, R.ORDER_DETAIL_NO, R.REVIEW_TITLE, R.REVIEW_CONTENT, R.REVIEW_RATING, R.REVIEW_DATE, R.GOODS_NO, R.REVIEW_READCNT, R.REVIEW_IMG, R.MEMBER_NAME, G.GOODS_NAME, G.GOODS_THUMBNAIL FROM REVIEW R, GOODS G WHERE R.MEMBER_NO = #{MEMBER_NO} AND R.GOODS_NO = G.GOODS_NO
